case_title: KIRSTEN KELP VS. EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT'S ORGANIZATION LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELP, KIRSTEN AS TO DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT'S ORGANIZATION LLC, A TEXAS LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
